element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic tool given by village chief before any dungeon exploration
Enables travel between islands; provided by uncle's robot assistant
Introduces closer camera view and combat against enemies
Obstacles within dungeons requiring navigation or destruction
Unlocked progressively as player advances; thematic to protagonist's background
Code 747 from physical letter required to progress; later codes from NPCs
Central plot macguffin; recovery requires infiltrating alien spaceship
Story revelation; enemies become increasingly dangerous

typical_relief_triggers: Returning to settlements (Coralcola and other villages)
Travel map segments with overhead view
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Chapter-based structure with alternating exploration and dungeon phases; tension escalates from local mysteries to planetary-scale threat

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: NPC dialogue branches; settlements allow exploration of non-essential areas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic combat and movement mechanics in Coralcola; gentle dungeon learning curve
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive weapon unlocks; increased enemy variety and dungeon complexity across island chapters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Spaceship infiltration with alien leader Zoda as culminating challenge; requires mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: First dungeon transition (overhead to closer view and combat)

notable_level_patterns.description: Top-down overhead view; players explore villages and interact with NPCs to gather information and unlock quest objectives
Closer camera view; navigation through obstacle-filled spaces with combat encounters; introduces tactical puzzle-solving
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Local dungeons accessible from each island

notable_level_patterns.description: Submarine-based navigation between settlements; overhead map view connecting chapters and story beats
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Travel stages between C-Island and other South Seas locations

notable_level_patterns.description: Environmental storytelling through NPC encounters (whale sequence, assistant confirmation, code retrieval) building toward alien threat escalation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-to-late game chapters with cumulative plot reveals
